Welcome to SIGCOMM 2025

ACM SIGCOMM is the flagship annual conference of the ACM Special Interest Group on Data Communication (SIGCOMM). ACM SIGCOMM 2025, the 39th edition of the conference series, will be held in Coimbra, Portugal, September 8 - 11, 2025.

Notification

  • The host of the conference will be the University of Coimbra and the venue is going to be the São Francisco Convent in Coimbra, Portugal.

News

September 13, 2025
All videos recorded during SIGCOMM'25 are now available on the official YouTube channel
September 11, 2025
SIGCOM’25 has concluded!!! Looking forward to seeing you at SIGCOMM’26
September 11, 2025
SIGCOMM'25 - DAY 4 Video is now available
September 11, 2025
Closing Session Video Recording is now available
September 11, 2025
HUAWEI Sponsor Talk Video Recording is now available
September 11, 2025
META Sponsor Talk Video Recording is now available
September 11, 2025
Community Session Video Recording is now available
September 11, 2025
Proceedings of the Posters and Demos is now available
September 11, 2025
Day 4 @ a glance:
  • Coffee Breaks - Morning (10:30) at the Cloisters on Level 1 and Foyer | Afternoon (15:10) at the Foyer
  • Lunch - From 12:30 to 13:30 at the Cloisters on Level 1
  • SIGCOMM'25 closing session at Auditorium (17:00)
September 10, 2025
SIGCOMM'25 - DAY 3 Video is now available
September 10, 2025
Video Recordings of the Technical Sessions are becoming available
September 10, 2025
Video Recordings of the Non-Paper Sessions are becoming available
September 10, 2025
Keynote Video Recording is now available
September 10, 2025
Day 3 @ a glance:
  • Coffee Breaks - Morning (10:30) and Afternoon (15:30) at the Cloisters on Level 1 and Foyer
  • Keynote by Bruce Davie at Auditorium (11:00)
  • Lunch - From 12:10 to 13:30 at the Cloisters on Level 1
  • Poster, Demos - From 15:30 to 16:30 at Aeminium
  • Transportation - Bus to banquet dinner departing from the Convent at 20:00 and come back at 23:00. They will drop people at these locations (Convent, Portagem, Praça da Republica, Area of Vila Galé and NH Coimbra hotels, Hotel Coimbra Aeminium)
  • Social event - Banquet dinner at Caves de Coimbra
September 09, 2025
SIGCOMM'25 - DAY 2 Video is now available
September 09, 2025
Best paper awards are now available
September 09, 2025
Day 2 @ a glance:
  • Coffee Breaks - Morning (10:20) and Afternoon (15:30) at the Cloisters on Level 1 and Foyer
  • Lunch - From 12:10 to 13:30 at the Cloisters on Level 1
  • Poster, Demos - From 15:30 to 16:30 at Aeminium
  • Social event - Student Mentorship Dinner at 19:30 at Quinta das Lágrimas Hotel
September 08, 2025
SIGCOMM'25 - DAY 1 Video is now available
September 08, 2025
Day 1 @ a glance:
  • Coffee Breaks - Morning (10:30) and Afternoon (15:45) at the Cloisters on Level 1
  • Lunch - From 12:45 to 14:00 at the Cloisters on Level 1
  • Transportation - Bus to tutorials at DMUC departing from the Convent (bottom of the stairs in front of the SIGCOMM banner) at 13:45 and coming back at 18:00
  • Social event - Welcome reception at 18h30 at the Convent gardens

Points of Distribution SIGCOMM 2025 info is now available
